<!--
Thanks for contributing to r2g!

Please read CONTRIBUTING.md before submitting your first pull request.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123" or "Part of #456" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation-only change
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup (no user-visible change)

## Testing

<!--
How did you verify the change? What commands did you run?
Paste relevant output if it helps reviewers.
-->

- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` passes
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -m "not integration"` passes
- [ ] New unit tests added for new code paths
- [ ] Integration tests run locally (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My change follows the coding conventions described there.
- [ ] I have updated `README.md` / `docs/PRD.md` as needed.
- [ ] I have added an entry under *Unreleased* in [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md).
- [ ] I have not committed any credentials, secrets, or private data.
